dbbot v0.0.1-beta.2 refines release packaging for end users.

This beta adds a curated release tarball that keeps the runtime-oriented repository layout while excluding maintainer-only and development-only content such as GitHub metadata, hidden files, logo assets, local download caches, example labs, playbook logs, and exporter source trees.

The GitHub source archives remain available as-is, while the managed dbbot tarball is now better aligned with actual deployment and evaluation usage.
